snapshot_ref.source: portfolio_snapshots row 32 — SAME snapshot as the 15:00 tick (no newer snapshot landed in the 15:00-15:30 inter-tick window; snapshot cadence is ~30 min and the 15:14-ish row has not yet been written). Realized component today is +₹1,424.80 (TORNTPOWER +₹1,834.20 at 10:12:35, ADANIPOWER -₹409.40 at 10:43:24); unrealized component is +₹1,669.55. Cumulative P&L +₹3,059.05 remains the first positive cumulative print of the 3-day session. Because the underlying snapshot has not refreshed, the numeric book state is identical to 15:00 and all deltas vs 15:00 are effectively 'STALE — SAME SNAPSHOT'. The only axis that IS advancing is the strategy-silence clock (continuous since 10:43:24).

session_context.market_status: OPEN (~6h 15m into regular session, ~15 min to close)
session_context.strategy_silence_since_last_action: 4h 47m (last action ADANIPOWER SELL at 10:43:24). The 2h composite-HIGH leg has been TRUE since 12:43:24 — 2h 47m. The 3h extension tripped at 13:43:24 — now 1h 47m past. The 4h extension tripped at 14:43:24 — now 47 min past. The 5h extension trips at 15:43:24 — 13 min from this tick (i.e., 13 min into the 15:30-16:00 inter-tick window).
session_context.delta_vs_15_00_tick: SNAPSHOT-STALE TICK — no new portfolio_snapshots row since the 14:44:52 row (snapshot_id 32) that was used at 15:00, so per-holding MTMs, deployed pct, daily P&L, and all sector/concentration numbers are BIT-FOR-BIT IDENTICAL to 15:00. Zero numeric book movement to report. The only advancing axis is the strategy-silence clock: 4h 17m (at 15:00) → 4h 47m (at 15:30), now 47 min past the 4h boundary and 13 min from the 5h boundary. No new trades, no new OPEN orders, strategy layer remains silent. This is the FIRST snapshot-stale tick of the Day-3 session and warrants explicit handling (the 14:30→15:00 tick had a fresh snapshot at 14:44:52; typical cadence would have put a 15:14-ish row in the db by now). Snapshot-stale state at 15:30 does NOT equal 'nothing changed in the market' — it means the risk_monitor must decide posture on 15:00-vintage data. Interpretation discipline: treat every numeric threshold check as carrying forward the 15:00 reading plus ~30 min of unknown market drift. Buffers computed on stale data are lower-bound estimates of current buffers if the market has drifted further beneficial, and upper-bound estimates if the market has drifted adverse. The 15:00 readings were MATERIALLY inside every fire line (book +0.309%, MAHABANK -5.37%, BFSI 36.17%, HINDUNILVR -2.12%) — even a ~30-50 bps adverse drift across the book would not push any trigger into fire state. So the posture decision is unchanged: HOLD.

Composite-HIGH MAHABANK leg FALSE (inside -5.5% by 13 bps — carried from 15:00). SL ₹74.50 unchanged. hold_rationale: No numeric overrides changed this tick. (1) SNAPSHOT-STALE — underlying portfolio data is IDENTICAL to 15:00 (snapshot_id 32 from 14:44:52), so no new numeric fact has appeared to trigger a lever. Firing on identical data that didn't fire 30 min ago would be self-inconsistent. (2) NO spec-hard trigger fired on carried data. Every threshold sits comfortably inside its fire line — same as 15:00: book +0.309% (inside -1% by 130.9 bps, POSITIVE), MAHABANK -5.37% (INSIDE -6% by 63 bps, -7% by 163 bps, -8% by 263 bps), BFSI 36.17% (inside 37% by 0.83 pp), HINDUNILVR -2.12% (inside -4% by 188 bps). Even ~50 bps of unseen adverse drift would leave every trigger well inside fire. (3) COMPOSITE HIGH CARRIES AT 1-OF-3 — the 15:00 component reversal persists. Moving further toward LOW-elevation, not HIGH. (4) The 15:00 ARMED CONDITIONAL ('if silence 4h+ AND MAHABANK below -5.88%') FAILED its component test for the 4th consecutive tick: silence leg TRUE (4h 47m, decisively past the 4h boundary), but MAHABANK leg FALSE on carried data — MAHABANK at -5.37% is 51 bps INSIDE the -5.88% arming line. The conditional elevation path continues to cleanly evaluate to 'do not elevate.' (5) STRATEGY SILENCE 4h 47m EXCEEDS 4H BOUNDARY BY 47 MIN — per 14:00 pattern-extension spec, 4h-alone without book ≤ -0.5% AND MAHABANK ≤ -5.88% does NOT mechanically elevate. Both co-conditions failed by material margins. Silence is strategy_reviewer's domain — the 16:30 tick is the native escalation path. (6) 5H SILENCE BOUNDARY (15:43:24) IS 13 MIN AWAY — silence-alone at 5h remains a prompt-layer / strategy_reviewer signal per the 15:00 spec extension, not a risk_monitor numeric lever. (7) AUBANK TRIANGLE CARRIES AT 2-OF-3 (gain + oversize). Unacted leg FALSE via today's 2 durable SELLs — triangle EFFECTIVELY CAPPED at 2-of-3 for the session. NO LEVER FIRE. (8) AUBANK +2% PROFIT-TAKING TRIP LIKELY RESOLVED IN THE INTERIM but not confirmed — neither resolution path (trip or reversion) fires a risk_monitor lever; both elevate strategy_reviewer signal at 16:30. (9) BFSI VIA-MTM GATE HOLDS FOR 5TH CONSECUTIVE TICK — durable invocation of the 13:30-origin rule. Winner-firming-driven sector lift is not admission pressure; do NOT fire min_confidence. (10) ADMISSION SURFACE OPEN for 4h 47m with no admission — tightening max_deployed_pct would close a door that is not being walked through; no firing trigger justifies it. (11) MARKET CLOSE APPROACHING — residual intraday lever-fire window is ~15 min. Any lever fire here is effectively EOD-tuning; strategy_reviewer's 16:30 tick is the structural-review channel. Tightening on snapshot-stale data 15 min before close would be motion without a trigger. (12) EXISTING OVERRIDE STACK (min_confidence 0.60, max_position_pct 0.15, max_deployed_pct 0.70, default_sl_pct 0.015, min_sl_pct 0.01, max_sl_pct 0.04) gates every admission surface tightly. Adding collateral knobs on carried-identical data in a still-beneficial regime with composite HIGH at 1-of-3 would be structurally contra-indicated. Disciplined HOLD is the correct action. (13) Risk level REMAINS MEDIUM (unchanged). Not stepped to HIGH — composite 1-of-3, all fire lines wide. Not stepped to LOW — grandfathered structural breaches plus 4h-47m silence prevent step-down without strategy-layer engagement.
